title: Error during pipx install in Dockerfile for n8n
symptom: The build process fails with 'externally-managed-environment' errors when trying to install Python packages using pipx in a Docker image for n8n.
applies_when: Building a custom Docker image for n8n
Using pipx to install Python packages
not_this_if: Using system pip instead of pipx
No errors during the build process
root_cause: The error occurs because pipx enforces isolation that is not suitable for container environments, especially when dependencies require compilation. Additionally, Alpine's musl libc can lead to compatibility issues with certain Python packages.
fix_steps: Use system pip to install Python packages directly in the virtual environment.
Ensure all required build tools and dependencies are installed in the Docker image.
agent_instruction: Modify the Dockerfile to use system pip instead of pipx for installing Python packages.
